body:
In Pleasanton, CA, a full garage door replacement typically costs between **$1,500 and $4,000+** for a standard two-car garage, including new doors, hardware, and installation. Given the high cost of living and labor in the San Francisco Bay Area, homeowners often see costs closer to the higher end of this range, especially for insulated or higher-end carriage-style doors. [Garage door replacement price and recommendation - Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/SanJose/comments/1iul17w/garage_door_replacement_price_and_recommendation/)[How Much Does a New Garage Door Cost in San Antonio? (A](https://precisiondoorsanantonio.com/learning-center/how-much-does-a-new-garage-door-cost-in-san-antonio-a-2026-guide)

**Key Price Drivers in 2026**

  * **Door Materials:** Insulated steel doors typically cost $900–$2,500, while premium wood or custom modern glass-panel doors can exceed $10,000.
  * **Installation Labor:** Professional installation typically adds $200–$800 per door, depending on complexity.
  * **Openers:** A new, high-end garage door opener (including installation) often adds another $600–$1,200. [How Much Does a New Garage Door Cost in San Antonio? (A](https://precisiondoorsanantonio.com/learning-center/how-much-does-a-new-garage-door-cost-in-san-antonio-a-2026-guide)

**Estimated Costs by Type (Including Labor)**

  * **Basic Single-Car Steel (Non-insulated):** $800 – $1,500.
  * **Standard Two-Car Insulated Steel:** $1,500 – $3,500.
  * **Carriage House / Faux Wood:** $2,000 – $5,000+. [Garage door replacement price and recommendation - Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/SanJose/comments/1iul17w/garage_door_replacement_price_and_recommendation/)[How Much Does a New Garage Door Cost in San Antonio? (A](https://precisiondoorsanantonio.com/learning-center/how-much-does-a-new-garage-door-cost-in-san-antonio-a-2026-guide)[How Much Does a Garage Door Replacement Cost in Ottawa (2025 Guide)](https://ottawa-garage-door.com/garage-door-replacement-cost-in-ottawa/)[Professional Garage Door Services | Repair & Installation Experts](https://gilsgaragedoors.com/garage-door-services/garage-door-replacement/)[Garage Door Replacement Cost: 2025 Price Guide & Factors](https://www.pro-mapper.com/windows-and-doors/garage-door-replacement-cost/)

For accurate quotes tailored to your home, consider contacting local California-based services like Pro Line Garage Doors or checking regional pricing on [Angi](https://www.angi.com/articles/garage-door-replacement-cost.htm).

If you'd like, I can:

  * Find top-rated **local installers in Pleasanton**
  * Compare costs of **single vs. double** garage doors
  * Detail the cost difference between **insulated and non-insulated** doors

Let me know how you'd like to proceed!
